subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the state of him who hath in this day turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon and partaken of the fruits of the divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نیکوست حال نفسیکه الیوم بافق اعلی اقبال نمود و از اثمار سدره الهیه که
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @unity; oneness of humanity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
